name: Dougie
description: A versatile micro.blog theme — microblog, publication, or one-page portfolio. Default + starfield variants. Each site configures branding, social links, CTA copy, and theme variant via the per-site plugin settings below.

parameters.title: Theme variant
parameters.description: Default = clean editorial style. Starfield = animated dark background, more personal/social register.

parameters.title: Site bio / tagline
parameters.description: One-line tagline shown under the site title in the header.

parameters.title: Profile / brand image URL
parameters.description: Absolute URL to a circular profile photo or square brand mark shown in the header.

parameters.title: Show consulting CTA on blog posts
parameters.description: When ON, the consulting CTA (with text and link below) renders at the bottom of every /blog/ post. Leave OFF for sites that aren't selling services.

parameters.title: Consulting CTA copy
parameters.description: Body copy shown in the CTA. Plain text or markdown.

parameters.title: Consulting CTA link
parameters.description: Where the CTA's call-to-action button points. mailto: or https://.

parameters.title: Social links (JSON)
parameters.description: JSON array of {label, url} objects rendered in the footer. e.g. [{"label":"LinkedIn","url":"https://linkedin.com/in/..."}]

parameters.title: Show share strip on single posts
parameters.description: Renders the LinkedIn/X/Bluesky/Reddit/HN/Email/Copy row below post body. Useful for content sites; less so for low-key personal feeds.
